description: Testing audio player display and behavior in different screen states including normal, full screen, and minimized views.

sub_items.description: Testing audio title display functionality with various character types, lengths, and interaction behaviors including redirection to related pages.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify Title of Audio display matching with design

Test with: EN characters, JP characters, number characters, special characters....
expected_result: Title of audio is displayed with format matching design

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify Title of Audio display when having min/max length

Test with: EN characters, JP characters, number characters, special characters....
expected_result: Title of audio is displayed with format matching design

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify that redirect to corresponding page when clicking on title of Audio

Test with: 
- Audio details
- Author of audio details
...
expected_result: Redirect to corresponding page

sub_items.description: Testing audio image display functionality in different player states, including support for various image formats and dimensions.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify Image of Audio display when audio is stopping 

Test with: 
- Image with Vertical format
- Image with Horizontal format
- Image with <= max size 
- Image with valid format type
expected_result: Image of audio is displayed matching with design

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify Image of Audio display when audio is playing

Test with: 
- Image with Vertical format
- Image with Horizontal format
- Image with <= max size 
- Image with valid format type
expected_result:
- Image of audio is displayed matching with design
- Image has Rotate Animation when playing audio
[base on required]

sub_items.description: Testing subtitle functionality including display formatting, synchronization with audio, and interaction with progress controls.

test_view_points.viewpoint:

+ Format of Subtitle as Blod or Italic
+ Font size
+ Position of sub...

Test with: Subtitle is EN characters or JP characters or number characters or special characters....
expected_result:
- Subtitle is displayed with format matching with design 
Ex:
+ Blue color for Subtitle is passed and gray for Subtitle is not passed
+ Format of Subtitle as Blod or Italic
+ Font size
+ Position of sub...

- Subtitle is played corresponding with Audio

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify Subtitle displays correctly when drag and drop progress bar
expected_result:
- Display Subtitle corresponding of Audio
- Subtitle is displayed with format matching with design 
Ex:
+ Blue color for Subtitle is passed and gray for Subtitle is not passed
+ Format of Subtitle as Blod or Italic
+ Font size
+ Position of sub...

description: Testing audio control functionality including play/stop, progress bar, time counter, and navigation buttons.

sub_items.description: Testing play/stop functionality in various states including normal clicks, multiple clicks, and network interruptions.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify state of Audio when clicking on Play/Stop icon while Audio is playing
expected_result: Audio will be stopped

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify state of Audio when clicking on Play/Stop icon while Audio is stopping
expected_result: Audio will be played

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify state of Audio when changing progress of Audio

Test with:
- Audio is playing
- Audio is stopping
expected_result: State of Audio is not changed when changing progress of Audio

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify state of Audio when double clicking on Play/Stop icon

Test with:
- Double clicking
- Clicking many time
- Audio is stopping 
- Audio is playing
expected_result: State of Audio is display correctly with lastest action on Play/Stop icon

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify state of play Audio when disconnect Internet
expected_result: State of Audio is changed from playing to stop correctly

sub_items.description: Testing progress bar display and interaction in different audio states including display formatting and user interactions.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify the display default of Progress bar

Test with: 
- Progress bar has gray color for default
expected_result: Progress bar is displayed matching with design

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify Progress bar display when audio is stopping

Test with:
- Audio playing at the start
- Audio playing at the middle
- Audio playing at the end
expected_result:
- Progress bar is passed and not passed display matching with design
(Color, position, format....)
Ex:
+ Blue color for Progress bar is passed and gray for Progress bar is not passed
+ Format of Progress bar as width, height...
+ Position...

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify Progress bar display when audio is playing

Test with:
- Audio playing at the start
- Audio playing at the middel
- Audio playing at the end
expected_result:
- Progress bar is passed and not passed display matching with design
Ex:
+ Blue color for Progress bar is passed and gray for Progress bar is not passed
+ Format of Progress bar as width, height...
+ Position...

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify that Progress bar auto play when audio is playing
expected_result: Progress bar is played corresponding with Audio

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify users can drag progress bar to any positions when Audio is stopping

Test with:
- Scroll Progress bar at the start 
- Scroll Progress bar at the middel
- Scroll Progress bar at the random indTest with
- Scroll Progress bar at the end
expected_result:
- Progress bar is passed and not passed display corresponding with index is scrolled
Ex:
+ Blue color for Progress bar is passed and gray for Progress bar is not passed
+ Format of Progress bar as width, height...
+ Position...

- Audio is still stopping

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify users can drag progress bar to any positions when Audio is playing

Test with:
- Scroll Progress bar at the start 
- Scroll Progress bar at the middel
- Scroll Progress bar at the random indTest with
- Scroll Progress bar at the end
expected_result:
- Progress bar is passed and not passed display corresponding with index is scrolled
Ex:
+ Blue color for Progress bar is passed and gray for Progress bar is not passed
+ Format of Progress bar as width, height...
+ Position...

- Audio is playing at index which is scrolled

sub_items.description: Testing time counter display functionality including default state, playing/stopping states, and interaction with progress bar.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify the display default of Time counter

Test with: Remain time and Total time...
00:00 / 06:45
expected_result:
- Remain time and total time is displayed default matching with design

[base on required]

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify Remain Time and Total time display when adio is stopping

Test with:
- Audio playing at the start
- Audio playing at the middel
- Audio playing at the end
expected_result:
- Remain time is displayed corresponding with Audio's remain time
Ex:
+ At the start: 00:00 / 06:45
+ At the middel: 03:23 / 06:45
+ At the end: 06:45 / 06:45

- Remain time is not counted when Audio is stopping

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify Remain Time and Total time display when adio is playing

Test with:
- Audio playing at the start
- Audio playing at the middel
- Audio playing at the end
expected_result:
- Remain time is displayed corresponding with Audio's remain time
Ex:
+ At the start: 00:00 / 06:45
+ At the middel: 03:23 / 06:45
+ At the end: 06:45 / 06:45

- Remain time is auto count remaining time when Audio is playing

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify Remain time and Total time display when scolling on Progress bar

Test with: 
- Scroll Progress bar at the start 
- Scroll Progress bar at the middel
- Scroll Progress bar at the random indTest with
- Scroll Progress bar at the end
expected_result:
- Remain time and Total are displayed correctly when scolling on Progress bar
Ex:
+ At the start: 00:00 / 06:45
+ At the middel: 03:23 / 06:45
+ At the end: 06:45 / 06:45

- Adjust min volume
expected_result:

description: Testing shuffle and loop functionality in both playing and stopping states, including behavior with single and multiple audio files in the playlist.

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify can turn on Shuffe/Loop option when audio is playing

Test with:
- List has 1 audio
- List has >=2 audio
expected_result:
- Can turn on shuffe/loop option successfully
- Display stage of Shuffe/Loop is ON

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify can turn on Shuffe/Loop option when audio is stopping

Test with:
- List has 1 audio
- List has >=2 audio
expected_result:
- Can turn on shuffe/loop option successfully
- Display stage of Shuffe/Loop is ON

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify that Audio auto replaying when turning on Shuffe option and has 1 audio on list
expected_result: Audio auto replaying when playing at the end

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify that Audio auto play nTest witht to random audio on list when turning on Shuffe option

Test with:
- Play audio at the fist audio of list
- Play audio at the end audio of list
- Play audio at the midle audio of list
expected_result: Audio auto play next to random audio when playing at the end

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify that Audio auto play nTest witht audio on list when turning on Loop option

Test with:
- Play audio at the fist audio of list
- Play audio at the end audio of list
- Play audio at the midle audio of list
expected_result:
Audio auto play next audio when playing at the end

Ex: 
- Audio auto play the second audio
- Audio auto play the first audio
- Audio auto play the next audio

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify can turn off Shuffe/Loop option when audio is playing

Test with:
- List has 1 audio
- List has >=2 audio
expected_result:
- Can turn off shuffe/loop option successfully
- Display stage of Shuffe/Loop is OFF

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify can turn off Shuffe/Loop option when audio is stopping

Test with:
- List has 1 audio
- List has >=2 audio
expected_result:
- Can turn off shuffe/loop option successfully
- Display stage of Shuffe/Loop is OFF

description: Testing audio quality settings including default values, user account-based quality options, and quality change functionality in different player states.

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify default value quality of audio
expected_result:
Display default value quality of audio matching with spec

Ex: 128kpbs

test_view_points.viewpoint:
Verify display of value on quality list for account login

Test with:
- Account is normal user
- Account is VIP user
expected_result:
- Display value corresponding with account login 

Ex: 
- 128kpbs and 320kpbs for normal user
- 128kpbs, 320kpbs and lossless for VIP user

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify that can change quality of audio when Audio is playing
expected_result:
- Change quality of audio successfully
- Play audio with selected quality

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify that can change quality of audio when Audio is stopping
expected_result:
- Change quality of audio successfully
- Play audio with selected quality

description: Testing audio download functionality including different quality options, authentication requirements, and user permission levels.

- Audio has small size as 128kpbs
- Audio has nomal size as 380kpbs
- Audio has big size as lossless
expected_result: Download audio successfully

test_view_points.viewpoint: Verify that can download Audio that is stopping
expected_result: Download audio successfully

expected_result:
Display correctly default name of audio

Ex: 
- Title of audio

expected_result: Quality of audio which is downloaded matching with quality is selected

expected_result: Play audio successfully

Verify display status of download icon for account login
